falsification_conditions.condition: SPX closes below 5200 on any daily session within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: The bottom_2024_aug pattern relied on a higher low structure; a break below 5200 would violate the support zone that defined that bottom and invalidate the 79% pattern match

falsification_conditions.condition: VIX closes above 25 for 2 consecutive days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: The August 2024 bottom featured VIX compression as a key feature; sustained VIX above 25 would indicate panic escalation rather than stabilization, breaking the pattern's volatility regime

falsification_conditions.condition: 10Y Treasury yield drops below 3.80% on a closing basis
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: The bottom_2024_aug pattern occurred during a yield stabilization/rising phase; a flight-to-quality bid driving yields below 3.80% would signal recession panic rather than soft-landing bottoming, invalidating the macro setup

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
